stories.title: Your Story Title
opening_lines: {initiator_horse} and {target_horse} discover something suspicious in the stable aisle.
event_lines: They investigate with a level of seriousness that does not match the situation.
ending_lines: By the end, both horses look proud of work nobody can fully explain.
cameo_none_lines: No one interrupts, and the stable accepts the outcome.
cameo_one_lines: {one_player} attempts to intervene and accidentally improves the chaos.
cameo_both_lines: {initiator_player} and {target_player} decide this definitely counts as enrichment.
